rows.label: tev000191_MSG0001
rows.name:
Ah, [ST:playername ]. Your timing is,
as always, impeccable.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000191_MSG0002
rows.name:
Since I can't seem to find
Vandham anywhere, might I ask
for your counsel instead?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000191_MSG0003
rows.name:
I've just received an emergency
request from a team of Pathfinder.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000191_MSG0004
rows.name:
They've been deployed to an extremely
dangerous area—one where we've
lost multiple teams already.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000191_MSG0005
rows.name:
At long last, this team succeeded in reaching their
destination. But the data probe they needed to
complete their mission was destroyed in battle.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000191_MSG0006
rows.name:
So the question is...how
should we deliver the replacement
supplies they require?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000191_MSG0007
rows.name:
We could send Avalanche or Interceptor,
but we can't dismiss the possibility that
they, too, could be wiped out en route.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000191_MSG0008
rows.name:
So perhaps the better choice is to
order the Pathfinder to retreat, then
begin planning a return mission.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000191_MSG0009
rows.name:
With the experience gained from this first trip—plus
an escort of Avalanche and Interceptor—there's a good
chance they could reach the destination again.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000191_MSG0010
rows.name:
So what would you choose? Attempt an
immediate delivery of replacement supplies,
or abort the mission and try again later?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000191_JNK0010
rows.name: Deliver Immediately

rows.label: tev000191_SEL0011
rows.name:
Say it's worth the risk
to complete the mission.

rows.label: tev000191_JNK0020
rows.name: Abort the Mission

rows.label: tev000191_SEL0021
rows.name:
Suggest Nagi order a retreat
and plan a new mission.

rows.label: tev000191_JNK0030
rows.name: Propose Plan C

rows.label: tev000191_SEL0031
rows.name: Offer to deliver the supplies yourself.

rows.label: tev000191_MSG0011
rows.name:
So you're saying that squandering
this opportunity could prove
to be the greater danger?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000191_MSG0012
rows.name:
Hmm. We'd be risking many lives, but that may be
the sort of risk we have to take if we hope to
accomplish anything on this dangerous world...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000191_MSG0013
rows.name:
And after all that you've
accomplished as a BLADE, I
don't take your opinion lightly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000191_MSG0014
rows.name:
It's settled then—we'll send the
Avalanche. If your gambit succeeds,
the benefits to NLA will be considerable.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000191_MSG0015
rows.name:
Now I must head back to BLADE HQ
and work out the particulars of
the mission. Good day to you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000191_MSG0016
rows.name:
Indeed. Our bodies may be Blue Bloods,
but they're still too precious an
asset to risk without good reason.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000191_MSG0017
rows.name:
It would be reckless to risk the
lives of so many BLADE operatives
on this single mission.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000191_MSG0018
rows.name:
As a wise man once said, "For he that fights and
runs away, may turn and fight another day." Let's
just hope the second time is the charm.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000191_MSG0019
rows.name:
I will order the Pathfinder
to retreat immediately.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000191_MSG0020
rows.name:
Thank you. After all that you've
accomplished as a BLADE, I don't
take your opinion lightly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000191_MSG0021
rows.name:
Now I must head back to BLADE HQ
and work out the particulars of
the new mission. Good day to you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000191_MSG0022
rows.name:
I like the way you think. If
I had my druthers, I'd go out
there with you myself.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000191_MSG0023
rows.name:
But I'm afraid this time,
it's not an option.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000191_MSG0024
rows.name:
Vandham has put his foot down.
He actually insists that
neither one of us can go.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000191_MSG0025
rows.name:
BLADE is a large organization,
and Elma's team is hardly the
only skilled one at our disposal.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000191_MSG0026
rows.name:
Apparently, Vandham thinks I need to utilize
some of these other teams in order to promote
group harmony and effectiveness.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000191_MSG0027
rows.name:
This won't be the last time this kind of problem arises,
and we'll need a better plan in the future. But for
now, we need to choose one of these two strategies.[ST:wait ]
